notes: v361 — FASTER SCANNING, FILTERING, SORTING & SCROLLING. You flagged the app dragging when you scan, filter, sort or scroll — I profiled it at ~2,900 shares and fixed the real causes, not guesses. A filter or 📡 Market Radar tile that took about a second to fully paint now lands in a couple hundred milliseconds. Scrolling is smoother — there was a shadow on the frozen first column that was forcing the browser to repaint on every single scroll frame (worst on phones); it's now a light border. And the old 'Show all', which could try to draw thousands of rows at once and freeze the page (≈195,000 elements!), is now a capped 'Show more' — up to 500 rows on desktop, 200 on phone — with a hint to use 🔍 search, a Radar tile, or a column sort to jump straight to a specific share. The table also shows a slightly tighter default for speed (120 on desktop, 60 on phone). Nothing about the rows themselves changed — only how they're drawn. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v361. ALSO RECENT — v360 report card: singles rated /10 + NO EDGE badge; v359 report card rates out of 10. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
